title: Compact Machines - Fabric
description: Minecraft Mod. Adds one simple game mechanic: Small rooms inside of blocks.
body:
Compact Machines

These are the main component of this mod and they allow you to build complicated machine contraptions and hide them within a single Compact Machine block.

This is a fabric port of [Compact Machines 4](https://github.com/compactmods/compactmachines)

Also consider joining my [Discord](https://discord.gg/xWPzrfuTjE) for more ports like this
